name: @prosopo/redis-client
description: Pluggable Redis client for non-blocking connections with smart index creation

scripts.build:bundle: echo "@prosopo/redis-client: no bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:es: echo "@prosopo/redis-client: no es bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:iife: echo "@prosopo/redis-client: no iife bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:webpack: echo "@prosopo/redis-client: no webpack bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.test:integration: NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV:-test}; NX_PARALLEL=1 TEST_TYPE=integration npx vitest run --config ./vite.test.config.ts

author: Prosopo Limited
